title: WIIS
description: Catches the spawn of an unwanted mob when it tries to spawn.
body:
## ***WIIS is in development! If you find any bug or problem related to the mod, then write in [WIIS Issues](https://github.com/CoADontAmazing/why-is-it-spawn/issues)***. 
## General
**WIIS** (Why Is It Spawn) is a simple mod for Minecraft that adds the ability to **control the appearance of interfering or problematic mobs**.

The mod **works only on the server side**. To work with the config **in a multiplayer game**, you need ***level 4 permission[¹](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Permission_level) on the server*** , and also ***WIIS must be enabled in the gamerules***.

### Switching WIIS via Gamerules :
```
/gamerule doUseWIIS [true|false]
```

### Commands:
- `/wiis-config info` - mod information.
- `/wiis-config query <mobId> <configKey>?` - sends mob config settings to chat or a specific mob config property.
- `/wiis-config modify <mobId> <configKey> [true|false]` - changes the property of the mob config.
- `/wiis-config clear <mobId>?` - clears all mob configs or clears a specific mob config.
